_comment: Species: Eternal Silence Beast (永寂兽) from Beyond the Timescape. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Eternal Silence Beast

canonical.appearance: Beast of perfect silence 6 m, body absorbs all sound, presence is deafening quiet
canonical.size: 6 m adult, 3000 jin; true form silences regions
canonical.behavior: Cultivates by absorbing sound; hunts by silencing prey
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: eternal_silence_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
